name: Proposal Engagement
summary: Scores a user's impact through proposals by rewarding funded, concluded work with strong community ratings and penalizing unfunded or low-rated proposals. Uses time decay so recent activity matters more.
description:
**Scope:** Only proposals from rounds **31, 36, and 107** are counted (these rounds have reliable team/owner data). Proposals from other rounds are skipped.

**Formulas:**
- **Community norm:** `norm = avg_rating / 5` (avg over community reviews, 0..1).
- **Time weight:** `tw = max(0, 1 - bucket × monthly_decay_rate_percent/100)`; bucket = floor(age_months). Proposals older than `engagement_window_months` get `tw = 0`.
- **Per-proposal:** funded_concluded → `proposalReward = tw × norm`; unfunded → `proposalPenalty = tw × (1 - norm)`.
- **Per-user:** `proposal_engagement = funded_concluded_reward_weight × Σ(rewards) - unfunded_penalty_weight × Σ(penalties)`.

**Inputs:**
- No manual file upload. Data is fetched from DeepFunding Portal APIs.

**Output:**
- Per-user proposal engagement score (CSV: `user_id`, `proposal_engagement`) plus an optional JSON details file with per-proposal breakdown for debugging.

inputs.label: Funded & Concluded Reward Weight
inputs.description: Reward strength for funded and concluded proposals. Formula: contributes to `proposal_engagement` as this weight × Σ(proposalReward) where proposalReward = tw × norm. Higher values increase the impact of successful proposals.

inputs.label: Unfunded Penalty Weight
inputs.description: Penalty strength for unfunded proposals. Formula: contributes to `proposal_engagement` as minus this weight × Σ(proposalPenalty) where proposalPenalty = tw × (1 - norm). Higher values penalize unfunded or low-rated proposals more.

inputs.label: Engagement Window (Months)
inputs.description: Proposals older than this many months get time weight tw = 0 and do not contribute. Must be between 1 and 72.

inputs.label: Monthly Decay Rate (%)
inputs.description: Decay per month bucket. Formula: tw = max(0, 1 - bucket × value/100) where bucket = floor(age_months). 0 = no decay, 100 = full decay after one month.

outputs.label: Proposal Engagement by User
outputs.description: Per-user CSV with columns: user_id (DeepFunding user ID), proposal_engagement (numeric score).

outputs.label: Proposal Engagement Details (JSON)
outputs.description: Full per-user breakdown including per-proposal intermediate values (rewards, penalties, time weights). For debugging and auditing.
